profileMeta.validation_status: PENDING - profile built from OGC-344 spec (40-column CSV, 4 real records validated). Header names inferred from column descriptions; must be validated against real history.csv.

column_spec.notes: Header names are inferred from OGC-344 column descriptions (Col 0=Serial Number, Col 1=Sample Number, etc.). Must be validated against real history.csv export. Column indices from spec: 0=Serial Number, 1=Sample Number, 3=Test Name, 4=Result, 5=Unit, 6=Reference Range, 21=Date/Time, 23=Reagent Lot, 25-27=PHI (excluded).

parsing_notes.metadata_row: Row 0 is a metadata line containing instrument serial number. Skipped via skipRows=1.
parsing_notes.comparison_operators: Result values may contain comparison operators (e.g. '<2', '>100'). These are stored as-is (string storage).
parsing_notes.reference_range_format: Column 6 may contain pipe-delimited interpretive criteria (e.g. 'Négatif：<5 | Indeterminate：5≤X≤25 | Positif：>25').
parsing_notes.phi_exclusion: Columns 25-27 (Patient Name, Age, Gender) must NOT be imported.
parsing_notes.encoding: UTF-8 (with Latin-1 fallback per OGC-344 spec)
